2605.30984.title: Generating Reports or Repeating Templates? Measuring and Mitigating Template Collapse in 3D CT Report Generation
2605.30984.paper_summary: Modern 3D medical vision-language models (VLMs) can generate fluent radiology-style text while exhibit critically low pathology detection and output diversity, collapsing to generic templates that under-report rare yet critical findings. We identify this failure mode as Template Collapse. This failure stems from the unique constraints of 3D medical imaging, e.g., limited data, severe label imbalance, and weak signals from volumetric encoders. Under these constraints, text-generation objectives encourage shortcut learning and fluent but weakly grounded reports. We systematically diagnose the Template Collapse through clinical fidelity, output diversity, normal-template bias, and rare-finding survival. To mitigate it, we propose CLarGen, a decoupled framework that separates what to say (clinical detection) from how to say it (language synthesis). CLarGen uses (i) a Latent Query Transformer for multi-label pathology detection, (ii) pathology-guided retrieval for clinically matched exemplars, and (iii) a medical language model to synthesize the final report from detected findings and retrieved context. Across state-of-the-art 3D CT report generation baselines, CLarGen mitigates Template Collapse and substantially improves clinical accuracy (macro-F1 0.487 vs. 0.189; CRG 0.472 vs. 0.368) while maintaining fluent reporting. Our results suggest that explicit, measurable clinical grounding is essential for template-collapse-resistant 3D CT report generation. Code will be released upon acceptance.
2605.30984.paper_summary_zh: 現代的3D醫學視覺語言模型（VLMs）能夠生成流暢的放射學風格文本，但在病理檢測和輸出多樣性方面表現出極低的水平，導致崩潰為通用模板，未能充分報告稀有但關鍵的發現。我們將這種失敗模式稱為模板崩潰。這一失敗源於3D醫學影像的獨特限制，例如，數據有限、標籤嚴重不平衡以及來自體積編碼器的信號微弱。在這些限制下，文本生成目標促進了捷徑學習，生成流暢但基礎薄弱的報告。我們通過臨床忠實度、輸出多樣性、正常模板偏見和稀有發現生存率系統性地診斷了模板崩潰。為了緩解這一問題，我們提出了CLarGen，一個解耦框架，將要說什麼（臨床檢測）與如何說（語言合成）分開。CLarGen使用（i）潛在查詢Transformer進行多標籤病理檢測，（ii）病理引導檢索以獲得臨床匹配的範例，以及（iii）醫學語言模型從檢測到的發現和檢索的上下文合成最終報告。在最先進的3D CT報告生成基準中，CLarGen緩解了模板崩潰，並顯著提高了臨床準確性（宏觀F1 0.487對0.189；CRG 0.472對0.368），同時保持流暢的報告。我們的結果表明，明確且可測量的臨床基礎對於抵抗模板崩潰的3D CT報告生成至關重要。代碼將在接受後發布。
2605.30984.author: Tom Maye-Lasserre et.al.
2605.30984.authors: Tom Maye-Lasserre, Yitong Li, Bailiang Jian, Morteza Ghahremani, Benedikt Wiestler, Christian Wachinger
